analysis_contract.aggregation: Median sgRNA LFC within gene and donor, matching the deposited author script.
analysis_contract.eligibility: Common gene identity across all four screens and both donors with at least the declared number of unique guides; no LFC, FDR, hit, sign, or magnitude field enters eligibility.
analysis_contract.selection: Top-k genes are selected only by absolute oriented effect in the source screen and training donor; all target screens and the held donor remain unread until the gene set is frozen.
analysis_contract.target_overlap: Held-target top-k is selected globally over the complete frozen universe, never within the source-selected subset.

claim_contract.claim_ceiling: Two-fixed-donor, source-selected functional-screen concordance; cross-screen rows jointly change donor plus modality/library or donor plus cytokine/cell-type context. Not transcriptomic reachability, modality or guide-library equivalence, cytokine or cell-type generality, guide-held-out replication, donor-population inference, efficacy, or target recommendation.
claim_contract.cross_context_label: donor-plus-cross-context transfer coupled across cytokine, CD4/CD8 cell type, and screen
claim_contract.cross_modality_label: donor-plus-modality-and-library transfer within the same cytokine/cell context
claim_contract.inference: No p-values, confidence intervals, or donor-population tests are emitted; the eight donor directions per class are correlated descriptive challenges.
not_claimed: transcriptomic effect dictionaries or whole-state reachability
scale equivalence between CRISPRa and reversed CRISPRi

interpretation.text: Whole-universe reproducibility is limited. Conditional on source-donor extreme-effect selection, same-screen held-donor concordance is strongest, joint donor-plus-context concordance is intermediate and confounded, and joint donor-plus-modality/library concordance is weaker. These results are descriptive and do not establish scale, guide, modality, cell-type, cytokine, donor-population, or biological-state generality.

provenance.same_donors_basis: Paper Methods: the CRISPRi screens followed the same procedure using T cells from the same donors as the CRISPRa screens.

source.citation: Schmidt et al., CRISPR activation and interference screens decode stimulation responses in primary human T cells, Science (2022)
source.same_donors_basis: Paper Methods: the CRISPRi screens followed the same procedure using T cells from the same donors as the CRISPRa screens.
